title: Purple PvP Pack
body:
This is a PvP resource pack with lots of purple
This pack will improve your eyesight during CPvP and simply look better than regular textures that REALLY interfere while because it’s an important aspect of Minecraft, and this pack will help you master it!

contains:

- No Fire
- No Explosion Particles
- Small Totem
- Small Totem Pop
- Remove Golden apples, golden carrot, steaks eating particles
- Custom Tools and Armour
